adult.titleAr: مريم بنت عمران: المصطفاة على نساء العالمين
adult.titleEn: Maryam Daughter of Imran: Chosen Above All Women
adult.contentAr: قبل الحديث عن عيسى لا بد من ذكر أمه التي اصطفاها الله على نساء العالمين: ﴿وَإِذْ قَالَتِ الْمَلَائِكَةُ يَا مَرْيَمُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ اصْطَفَاكِ وَطَهَّرَكِ وَاصْطَفَاكِ عَلَىٰ نِسَاءِ الْعَالَمِينَ﴾. نذرتها أمها لخدمة بيت المقدس وهي في بطنها، وتولى كفالتها نبي الله زكريا. كانت عابدة قانتة لا تفتر عن ذكر الله، وكان الله يرزقها رزقاً خاصاً: فاكهة الصيف في الشتاء وفاكهة الشتاء في الصيف. هذه الرعاية الإلهية الاستثنائية كانت تمهيداً لمهمة أعظم: أن تحمل كلمة الله وروحه — عيسى ابن مريم — بغير أب. مريم هي المرأة الوحيدة التي سُمّيت سورة كاملة باسمها في القرآن.
adult.contentEn: Before speaking of Isa, one must mention his mother whom Allah chose above all women: 'And when the angels said: O Maryam, indeed Allah has chosen you and purified you and chosen you above the women of the worlds.' Her mother dedicated her to the service of the Temple while she was still in the womb, and Prophet Zakariyya became her guardian. She was a devoutly worshipful woman ceaselessly remembering Allah, and Allah provided for her specially: summer fruits in winter and winter fruits in summer. This exceptional divine care was preparation for a greater mission: to carry the Word of Allah and His Spirit — Isa son of Maryam — without a father. Maryam is the only woman after whom an entire surah is named in the Quran.

adult.titleAr: ميلاد عيسى المعجز: كلمة الله وروحه
adult.titleEn: The Miraculous Birth of Isa: The Word and Spirit of Allah
adult.contentAr: أرسل الله جبريل إلى مريم في صورة بشر سوي فخافت منه. فطمأنها: ﴿إِنَّمَا أَنَا رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَامًا زَكِيًّا﴾. تعجبت: كيف يكون لها ولد ولم يمسسها بشر؟ فقال: ﴿كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَيَّ هَيِّنٌ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُ آيَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا﴾. حملت بعيسى بأمر الله — كلمة منه ألقاها إلى مريم وروح منه. لما جاءها المخاض اعتزلت أهلها وألجأها إلى جذع نخلة: ﴿يَا لَيْتَنِي مِتُّ قَبْلَ هَٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا﴾. فناداها من تحتها ألا تحزني، وهزّي النخلة تساقط رطباً جنياً، وكُلي واشربي وقرّي عيناً. وُلد عيسى ولادة فريدة لا مثيل لها إلا خلق آدم: ﴿إِنَّ مَثَلَ عِيسَىٰ عِندَ اللَّهِ كَمَثَلِ آدَمَ خَلَقَهُ مِن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ كُن فَيَكُونُ﴾.
adult.contentEn: Allah sent Jibreel to Maryam in the form of a well-proportioned man, and she was frightened. He reassured her: 'I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you a pure boy.' She wondered: how could she have a son when no man had touched her? He said: 'Thus has your Lord said: It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us.' She conceived Isa by Allah's command — a Word from Him cast to Maryam and a Spirit from Him. When labor pains came, she withdrew from her family and was driven to a palm trunk: 'Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten.' A voice called from below not to grieve, to shake the palm tree for fresh dates, and to eat, drink, and be content. Isa was born with a birth unique in creation, paralleled only by Adam's: 'Indeed, the example of Isa to Allah is like that of Adam. He created him from dust; then He said to him: Be, and he was.'

adult.titleEn: Speaking in the Cradle: Maryam's Vindication
adult.contentAr: جاءت مريم بعيسى إلى قومها فصُدموا: ﴿يَا مَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْئًا فَرِيًّا * يَا أُخْتَ هَارُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ امْرَأَ سَوْءٍ وَمَا كَانَتْ أُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا﴾. أشارت إلى الطفل الرضيع. تعجبوا: كيف نكلم من كان في المهد صبياً؟ فتكلم عيسى بأعجوبة: ﴿إِنِّي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ آتَانِيَ الْكِتَابَ وَجَعَلَنِي نَبِيًّا * وَجَعَلَنِي مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَانِي بِالصَّلَاةِ وَالزَّكَاةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّا * وَبَرًّا بِوَالِدَتِي وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِي جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا﴾. أول كلمة قالها: 'إني عبد الله' — ليؤكد عبوديته لله ويقطع أي ادعاء مستقبلي بألوهيته. ثم ذكر البر بأمه والتواضع. هذا الكلام المعجز في المهد برّأ مريم أمام الناس.
adult.contentEn: Maryam brought Isa to her people and they were shocked: 'O Maryam, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented. O sister of Harun, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste.' She pointed to the infant. They wondered: how can we speak to one who is in the cradle? Then Isa spoke miraculously: 'Indeed, I am the servant of Allah. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet. And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and charity as long as I remain alive. And dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant.' His first word was: 'I am the servant of Allah' — to affirm his servitude and preempt any future claim of divinity. Then he mentioned duty to his mother and humility. This miraculous speech in the cradle vindicated Maryam before the people.

adult.titleEn: Isa's Miracles: Signs by Allah's Permission
adult.contentAr: أيّد الله عيسى بمعجزات باهرة — وكلها بإذن الله وقدرته لا بقوة عيسى الذاتية: ﴿إِذْ قَالَ اللَّهُ يَا عِيسَى ابْنَ مَرْيَمَ اذْكُرْ نِعْمَتِي عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَتِكَ إِذْ أَيَّدتُّكَ بِرُوحِ الْقُدُسِ﴾. كان يُبرئ الأكمه (من ولد أعمى) والأبرص بإذن الله. ويُحيي الموتى بإذن الله. ويخلق من الطين كهيئة الطير فينفخ فيها فتكون طيراً بإذن الله. وينبئ الناس بما يأكلون وما يدّخرون في بيوتهم. وآتاه الله الإنجيل: ﴿وَآتَيْنَاهُ الْإِنجِيلَ فِيهِ هُدًى وَنُورٌ﴾. والقرآن يؤكد في كل معجزة 'بإذن الله' ليقطع الغلو فيه. آمن به الحواريون — أنصاره المخلصون: ﴿نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ اللَّهِ آمَنَّا بِاللَّهِ وَاشْهَدْ بِأَنَّا مُسْلِمُونَ﴾.
adult.contentEn: Allah supported Isa with brilliant miracles — all by Allah's permission and power, not Isa's own: 'When Allah said: O Isa son of Maryam, remember My favor upon you and upon your mother when I supported you with the Pure Spirit.' He healed the blind from birth and the leper by Allah's permission. He gave life to the dead by Allah's permission. He created from clay the form of a bird and breathed into it and it became a bird by Allah's permission. He informed people of what they ate and stored in their houses. Allah gave him the Gospel: 'And We gave him the Gospel, in which was guidance and light.' The Quran emphasizes 'by Allah's permission' with every miracle to prevent extremism about him. The disciples believed in him — his loyal supporters: 'We are supporters of Allah. We have believed in Allah and testify that we are Muslims.'

adult.titleEn: Isa Gives Glad Tidings of Muhammad ﷺ
adult.contentAr: كانت رسالة عيسى تصديقاً لما بين يديه من التوراة وتبشيراً بالرسالة الخاتمة: ﴿وَإِذْ قَالَ عِيسَى ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ يَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ إِنِّي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ إِلَيْكُم مُّصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ مِنَ التَّوْرَاةِ وَمُبَشِّرًا بِرَسُولٍ يَأْتِي مِن بَعْدِي اسْمُهُ أَحْمَدُ﴾. أحمد هو اسم من أسماء النبي محمد ﷺ. فرسالة عيسى كانت جسراً بين التوراة والقرآن، وحلقة في سلسلة النبوة الواحدة. لم تكن ديناً جديداً منفصلاً بل استمراراً لرسالة التوحيد التي حملها إبراهيم وموسى وكل الأنبياء. ودعوته كانت لبني إسرائيل خاصة — على خلاف رسالة محمد ﷺ التي جاءت للناس كافة.
adult.contentEn: Isa's message confirmed the Torah before him and gave glad tidings of the final message: 'And when Isa son of Maryam said: O Children of Israel, indeed I am the messenger of Allah to you confirming what came before me of the Torah, and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me, whose name is Ahmad.' Ahmad is one of Prophet Muhammad's ﷺ names. Isa's message was a bridge between the Torah and the Quran, a link in the single chain of prophethood. It was not a new separate religion but a continuation of the monotheistic message carried by Ibrahim, Musa, and all the prophets. His call was specifically to the Children of Israel — unlike Muhammad's ﷺ message which came for all of humanity.

adult.titleAr: الرفع إلى السماء: نجاة من الصلب
adult.titleEn: Raised to Heaven: Salvation from Crucifixion
adult.contentAr: لما اشتد كيد بني إسرائيل بعيسى وبيّتوا قتله، تدخلت القدرة الإلهية: ﴿وَمَا قَتَلُوهُ وَمَا صَلَبُوهُ وَلَٰكِن شُبِّهَ لَهُمْ﴾. رفع الله عيسى إليه حياً بروحه وجسده: ﴿بَل رَّفَعَهُ اللَّهُ إِلَيْهِ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا﴾. لم يُقتل ولم يُصلب — بل أُلقي الشبه على غيره. هذا الاعتقاد قاطع في القرآن لا يحتمل التأويل. وعيسى سينزل في آخر الزمان علامة من علامات الساعة الكبرى، ليحكم بشريعة الإسلام ويكسر الصليب ويقتل الخنزير. قال تعالى: ﴿وَإِن مِّنْ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ إِلَّا لَيُؤْمِنَنَّ بِهِ قَبْلَ مَوْتِهِ وَيَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ يَكُونُ عَلَيْهِمْ شَهِيدًا﴾.
adult.contentEn: When the Children of Israel intensified their plotting against Isa to kill him, divine power intervened: 'And they did not kill him, nor did they crucify him; but it was made to appear so to them.' Allah raised Isa to Himself alive in body and spirit: 'Rather, Allah raised him to Himself. And ever is Allah Exalted in Might and Wise.' He was not killed nor crucified — but the resemblance was cast upon another. This belief is definitive in the Quran, admitting no alternative interpretation. Isa will descend at the end of times as one of the major signs of the Hour, ruling by Islamic law, breaking the cross, and killing the swine. Allah said: 'And there is none from the People of the Scripture but that he will surely believe in him before his death. And on the Day of Resurrection he will be against them a witness.'

adult.titleAr: عيسى عبد الله ورسوله: تصحيح العقيدة
adult.titleEn: Isa: Servant of Allah and His Messenger — Correcting Creed
adult.contentAr: يوم القيامة يسأل الله عيسى أمام الخلائق: ﴿أَأَنتَ قُلْتَ لِلنَّاسِ اتَّخِذُونِي وَأُمِّيَ إِلَٰهَيْنِ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ﴾. فيجيب: ﴿سُبْحَانَكَ مَا يَكُونُ لِي أَنْ أَقُولَ مَا لَيْسَ لِي بِحَقٍّ... مَا قُلْتُ لَهُمْ إِلَّا مَا أَمَرْتَنِي بِهِ أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ رَبِّي وَرَبَّكُمْ﴾. عيسى عبد الله ورسوله وكلمته ألقاها إلى مريم وروح منه — ﴿لَّن يَسْتَنكِفَ الْمَسِيحُ أَن يَكُونَ عَبْدًا لِّلَّهِ﴾. القرآن يصحح الغلو فيه: ﴿لَقَدْ كَفَرَ الَّذِينَ قَالُوا إِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الْمَسِيحُ ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ﴾. عيسى نبي كريم عظيم — لكنه بشر لا إله، ورسول لا ابن إله. وموقف الإسلام منه وسط بين من كذّبه ومن أله — يحبه ويؤمن به نبياً ورسولاً.
adult.contentEn: On Judgment Day, Allah will ask Isa before all creation: 'Did you say to the people: Take me and my mother as deities besides Allah?' He will answer: 'Exalted are You! It was not for me to say that to which I have no right... I said not to them except what You commanded me — to worship Allah, my Lord and your Lord.' Isa is the servant of Allah and His messenger, His Word cast to Maryam and a Spirit from Him — 'Never would the Messiah disdain to be a servant of Allah.' The Quran corrects the extremism: 'They have certainly disbelieved who say: Allah is the Messiah, son of Maryam.' Isa is a noble, great prophet — but human, not divine; a messenger, not the son of God. Islam's position is balanced between those who denied him and those who deified him — loving him and believing in him as a prophet and messenger.

kids.contentAr: يا أبطال، السيدة مريم كانت ست طيبة جداً بتعبد ربنا كتير. ربنا اختارها واصطفاها على كل ستات العالم! يوم من الأيام ربنا بعت لها الملك جبريل قالها: 'ربنا هيرزقك بطفل اسمه عيسى — من غير أب!'. مريم اتعجبت بس ربنا قادر على كل حاجة. لما خلفت عيسى ورجعت لقومها، الناس اتكلموا عليها كلام وحش. بس معجزة حصلت! عيسى الرضيع — البيبي الصغنون — اتكلم وقال: 'أنا عبد الله! أعطاني الكتاب وخلاني نبي!'. تخيلوا بيبي بيتكلم! ده عشان ربنا يثبت إن مريم بريئة.
kids.contentEn: Heroes, Lady Maryam was a very kind woman who worshipped Allah a lot. Allah chose her above all the women in the world! One day Allah sent Angel Jibreel to tell her: 'Allah will give you a baby named Isa — without a father!' Maryam was amazed but Allah can do anything. When she gave birth to Isa and went back to her people, they said mean things about her. But a miracle happened! Baby Isa — the tiny little baby — spoke and said: 'I am the servant of Allah! He gave me the Scripture and made me a prophet!' Imagine a baby talking! This was to prove that Maryam was innocent.

kids.contentAr: لما سيدنا عيسى كبر، ربنا بعته نبي لبني إسرائيل. وأعطاه معجزات كتير بإذن الله: كان بيشفي المرضى — حتى اللي اتولدوا عميان يخليهم يشوفوا! وكان بيحيي الموتى بإذن الله! وكان بيعمل من الطين شكل عصفورة وينفخ فيها فتطير! سبحان الله! بس كل ده بإذن الله مش من عيسى نفسه. عيسى كان بيقول للناس: 'اعبدوا الله وحده!'. وبشّر بنبي عظيم هييجي بعده اسمه 'أحمد' — وهو سيدنا محمد ﷺ. ولما أعداؤه حاولوا يأذوه، ربنا رفعه للسماء حي! ربنا حماه وأنقذه!
kids.contentEn: When Prophet Isa grew up, Allah sent him as a prophet to the Children of Israel. He gave him many miracles by Allah's permission: he could heal sick people — even those born blind could see! He brought dead people back to life by Allah's permission! He made a bird from clay, blew into it, and it flew! SubhanAllah! But all of this was by Allah's permission, not from Isa himself. Isa told people: 'Worship Allah alone!' He gave good news of a great prophet coming after him named 'Ahmad' — that's Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. When his enemies tried to harm him, Allah raised him to heaven alive! Allah protected and saved him!

kids.titleEn: Isa is Allah's Servant, Not God
kids.contentAr: يا أبطال، حاجة مهمة جداً لازم نفهمها: سيدنا عيسى نبي عظيم وإحنا بنحبه جداً — بس هو عبد الله ورسوله مش إله! أول كلمة قالها وهو بيبي كانت: 'إني عبد الله'. ربنا خلقه من غير أب — زي ما خلق آدم من تراب. القرآن قال: 'إن مثل عيسى عند الله كمثل آدم'. يعني ربنا خلق آدم من غير أب ولا أم، وخلق عيسى من غير أب — كلهم مخلوقات ربنا. وسيدنا عيسى هيرجع تاني في آخر الزمان. نتعلم من قصته إن ربنا قادر على كل حاجة وإن كل الأنبياء رسالتهم واحدة: اعبدوا الله وحده!
kids.contentEn: Heroes, there's something very important we need to understand: Prophet Isa is a great prophet and we love him very much — but he is Allah's servant and messenger, not God! The very first word he said as a baby was: 'I am the servant of Allah.' Allah created him without a father — just like He created Adam from dust. The Quran says: 'Indeed, the example of Isa to Allah is like Adam.' Meaning Allah created Adam without a father or mother, and created Isa without a father — they are all Allah's creations. And Prophet Isa will come back again at the end of times. We learn from his story that Allah can do anything and that all prophets had one message: worship Allah alone!
